title: She Professed Herself Pupil of the Wise Man
titleRomaji: Kenja no Deshi wo Nanoru Kenja
titleEnglish: She Professed Herself Pupil of the Wise Man
titleNative: 賢者の弟子を名乗る賢者
synonyms: ฉันเป็นศิษย์จอมปราชญ์จริงๆ นะ
Petapa Sihir yang Mengaku sebagai Murid Petapa Sihir
synopsis: Kagami Sakimori plays as the great mage Danblf in his favorite MMO. He falls asleep after a night of testing new character appearances, but instead of waking up to a suspended game, he’s inside of Arch Earth Online—as a girl! Now named Mira, he must convince the game’s people that Mira is a pupil of Danblf, who vanished without a trace 30 years ago…and figure out how he got here. (Source: Funimation)

title: Mahou no Star Magical Emi: Kumo Hikaru
titleRomaji: Mahou no Star Magical Emi: Kumo Hikaru
titleNative: 魔法のスターマジカルエミ 雲光る
synopsis: In this 15-minute short story, released more than 15 years after the finale of the popular Mahou no Star Magical Emi franchise, a new life was born into the Kazuki family. How did her baby brother change the family's life and what are Mai's feelings about him. At the end of an eventful day for the siblings and Shou, another concert is waiting for Emi.

title: Goliath the Super Fighter
titleNative: ゴワッパー5ゴーダム
synopsis: Five youths from Edo City explore a strange rocky island and discover the mecha that Doctor Hoarai had been creating in order to resist the impending attack by a race of subterranean rock people. Doctor Hoarai was ridiculed by the scientific community for his predictions that such an attack would take place. The youths decide to join the doctor (who was dead but had transferred his mind into a computer) in piloting the vehicles and protecting Earth. The Gowapper 5 Godam team is born! With the aid of the giant fighting robot Godam, the Gowapper team under the leadership of Yoko Misaki must face the hordes of the inhuman subterranean people.

title: Dr. Slump and Arale-chan: N-cha! Love Comes From Penguin Village
titleRomaji: Dr. Slump: Arale-chan - Ncha! Penguin Mura yori Ai wo Komete
titleEnglish: Dr. Slump and Arale-chan: N-cha! Love Comes From Penguin Village
titleNative: Ｄｒ．スランプ アラレちゃん んちゃ！ペンギン村より愛をこめて
synopsis: Dr. Slump movie 7.

title: Africa Salaryman
titleNative: アフリカのサラリーマン (TV)
synopsis: Imagine your co-workers–a lion, toucan, and lizard! Hey it can happen right? Africa Salaryman is a comedic take on office life of three African jungle animals who could be your potential co-workers in corporate America. It’s full of ridiculous office place antics and hilarious scenarios, that keeps things quite entertaining, while the animals cope with their working environment. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: ONE PIECE in LOVE: ONE PIECE DAY’25 Festival Eve Special
titleRomaji: Koisuru ONE PIECE: ONE PIECE DAY'25 Zenyasai Tokubetsu-hen
titleEnglish: ONE PIECE in LOVE: ONE PIECE DAY’25 Festival Eve Special
titleNative: 恋するワンピース ONE PIECE DAY'25 前夜祭特別編
synopsis: The special episode “ONE PIECE in LOVE: ONE PIECE DAY’25 Festival Eve Special”, which was surprise-screened at the ONE PIECE DAY’25 DAY1 on Saturday, August 9, 2025. This time, the characters of ONE PIECE in LOVE join in on the fun of ONE PIECE DAY’25! The episode also features Hiroshi Kitadani—known for the first ONE PIECE opening theme” We Are!”—making his debut as a voice actor! (Source: ONE PIECE Official YouTube Channel, edited) Note: This short briefly mentions some content from the Elbaf arc in the manga.

title: Candy Candy (Movie)
titleNative: キャンディ・キャンディ
synopsis: A young girl named Candice White who was left on the doorstep of the "Pony Home", an orphanage, when she was just a baby. The sisters took her first name from a doll she had in her basket, with the name "Candy" on it, and her last name from the snowstorm she was rescued from. Life is quiet and happy.. or.. as quiet as life can be with Candy around. She has a penchant for getting into trouble, climbing trees and tussling with the best of them. However, tragedy begins to strike. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Aikatsu Planet!
titleNative: アイカツプラネット！
synopsis: Otoha Mao, a normal first-year high school student, has a sudden encounter with Hinata Meisa, and thereafter falls into the position of taking over as the top idol Hana in Aikatsu Planet. But at the same time, she needs to keep the fact that she's now Hana a secret! Aikatsu Planet is the story of Mao and her friends doing their idol activities and aiming to become top idols.

title: Yuuki Yuuna wa Yuusha de Aru Churutto!
titleRomaji: Yuuki Yuuna wa Yuusha de Aru Churutto!
titleNative: 結城友奈は勇者である ちゅるっと！
synopsis: It is the year 300 of the Divine Era. The world inside the Shinju where all Heroes and Mikos were summoned from all ages during the crisis of the Shinju. They gathered in Sanshuu Middle School Hero Club and have transformed it into a large family with a total of 27 members. The club president, Inubouzaki Fuu who gathered these powerful friends together, announces the development of the long-awaited Hero Club Udon.

title: Honkai: Star Rail — H-Hello, I'm Huohuo.
titleRomaji: Benghuai: Xingqiong Tiedao - Ni... Nihao, Wo Jiao Huohuo
titleEnglish: Honkai: Star Rail — H-Hello, I'm Huohuo.
titleNative: 崩坏：星穹铁道 你…你好，我叫藿藿
synonyms: 崩壊：スターレイル こ、こんにちは…アタシの名前はフォフォ
Houkai: Star Rail - Ko, Konnichiwa... Ashita no Namae wa Huohuo
붕괴: 스타레일 아, 안녕하세요…. 전 곽향이에요
Bunggoe: Star Rail - A, Annyeonghaseyo.... Jeon Gwak Hyangieyo
synopsis: "H—Hello, I'm Huohuo, the newly appointed judge of the Ten-Lords Commission. Um... what else should I mention.." "Ahem... Uh, Hello? Don't forget to introduce the most famous heliobus of all..." "Ah, yes — Tail! This is Tail!" (Source: Honkai Star Rail YouTube Channel)

title: Glass Fleet: The Legend of the Wind of the Universe
titleRomaji: Glass no Kantai: La legende du vent de l'univers
titleEnglish: Glass Fleet: The Legend of the Wind of the Universe
titleNative: ガラスの艦隊～La legende du vent de l'univers～
synopsis: A revolution stirs in the dark reaches of space. Michel Volban leads The People’s Army against the oppression of self-proclaimed Holy Emperor, Vetti Sforza. Just as it appears the rebellion will be crushed, a hero arrives to join the fight. Pirate Cleo Corbeille—the last of the fallen Royal Family—steers his sleek battleship into battle and brings new hope that freedom can be obtained. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Luger Code 1951
titleNative: ルガーコード 1951
synopsis: The story centers around the young linguistic genius and university professor Testa. He is introduced by his senior, Sergeant Rossa, to the Allied Cryptanalysis Department. There, he is tasked to break the enemy werewolves' code, which the werewolves are using to encrypt their radio transmissions. Testa is astounded, as the only sound the encrypted code produces is the howling of a wolf. His research yields no results, and he resolves to capture a live werewolf for better cryptanalysis. After exhausting all possible means, he finally finds a female werewolf, Yonaga. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Azusa Will Help!
titleNative: アズサ、お手伝いします！
synopsis: The Karugamo High School Baseball Team has not been doing well. After losing badly to the Eagles, many of the players leave, and the team now has only eight players, one too few to play a game. Going against his principles, the main character Harumaki Shunpei decides to buy a baseball robot. However, since he does not have enough money, he ends up buying the maid robot named Azusa. Even though Azusa has a warm heart and strong determination, it doesn't appear that she stands a chance against her adversaries who were top-of-the-line baseball robots. The team's only hope seems to lie in a secret buried within Azusa's clouded past.

title: Knight Hunters OVA
titleNative: Weiß Kreuz ヴァイスクロイツ OVA
synopsis: Someone out there is determined to see the fall of Weiss Kreuz, and it looks like they have found the perfect plan for it. The four assassins find themselves trapped in a deadly game of deceit, where the question of honor versus duty comes to surface. Now they must fight for their own reasons to survive--and there can be only be one victor in this field of death. (Source: AniDB)

titleNative: ゴーゴーアックマン
synopsis: Go! Go! Ackman is the story about a 200 year old demon child named Ackman who harvests souls for the Dark Devil Lord. Note: First released to public at 1994 V-Jump Festa, later it became a special video feature to be requested by V-Jump purchasers. (Source: Anime News Network, edited)

titleEnglish: Legend of the Galactic Heroes Gaiden: Golden Wings
titleNative: 銀河英雄伝説外伝　黄金の翼

synopsis: Reinhard von Müsel, a poor nobleman's son, one day discovers that his sister, Annerose, has been sold to the royal family. To get her back he sets out to rise quickly through the military along with his friend Siegfried Kircheis. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Juusenshi Gulkeeva
titleNative: 獣戦士ガルキーバ
synopsis: The world we live in is called Earthside in this story. There are the other worlds called Nosfertia, Heavenstia, and Eternalia. When Darknoids from Nosfertia begun invasion to Earthside, Heavenstia sent 3 Animanoids (beast-humans) to prevent it. The lead character Touya had believed that he was a mere human but found he was actually a being of Eternalia. With the help of 3 Animanoids, Touya fights to defend Earthside.

title: Jewel BEM Hunter Lime
titleNative: 宝魔ハンターライム
synopsis: For centuries, the magic and human worlds have been at peace with each other, though physically seperated by a magical gate. But when the powerful magic spheres are stolen and fall to the Earth below, the king of magic sends Boss, a fighter; Lime, a master transformer; and Poogie, a master morpher to retrieve them. With not much time, the trio must retrieve the spheres which, when in contact with the human world, suck up the negative emotions of household objects and become BEMs, Bug Eyed Monsters!
